## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] ADC context was loaded from `.adc/index.md` and `.adc/prompt-rules.md`.
- [ ] README version and date are accurate for this change.
- [ ] PowerShell scripts parse successfully when behavior changed.
- [ ] JSON config files parse with `ConvertFrom-Json` when configuration changed.
- [ ] Manual UI smoke evidence or automated test evidence is documented when behavior changed.
- [ ] Architecture and data-flow diagrams were updated when behavior or structure changed.

## Policy Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, mapped-drive credentials, private keys, or private file contents are included.
- [ ] Generated indexes and runtime outputs are excluded unless intentionally included.
- [ ] CGA-Relay activity/indexing was recorded when ContextGraph credentials were configured.
